rationale: Vivid, well-organized essay with a clear arc from fear and precarity to dignity and solidarity. Concrete details—the safety meeting, break time, benefits talk, quitting time—make the change in the writer’s idea of work feel specific and believable. The voice is strong and human. It is slightly more lyrical than plainspoken in spots, so simplicity and economy are a bit lower than perfect.
